description: Paired 200-Agent screen of medical-need differentiation in elderly weather-exposure mode choice.
scope_notes: medical_need_level already exists in the population and continues to determine medical-activity frequency.
This experiment additionally lets it multiply choice-stage weather outdoor-exposure disutility only.
It does not change physiological heat dose, weather cancellation, activity destinations, fares, digital availability or dispatch priority.
W0 must remain behaviorally identical because its weather-exposure utility penalty is zero.
